name: Apple Design
description: Apple's approach to fluid, physical interface design — springs, gestures, momentum, and interruptible motion — translated for the web.

install.cursor: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill apple-design -a cursor -g -y
install.claude: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill apple-design -a claude-code -g -y
install.codex: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill apple-design -a codex -g -y
install.vscode: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill apple-design -a github-copilot -g -y
